data.title: Investor rights firm Halper Sadeh LLC urges IMXI, TRUE, PRO shareholders to discuss their rights; limited time.
data.description: Investors are advised to promptly get in touch with the company as time is limited to protect their rights. A New York-based law firm named Halper Sadeh LLC is currently looking into several companies for potential breaches of federal securities regulations.

data.title: BTC may drop below $60,000 due to profit booking and bearish patterns, as per CoinMarketCap data.
data.description: The price of Bitcoin is facing downward pressure as investors engage in profit-taking and bearish technical indicators emerge, potentially pushing the price below the $60,000 mark, as reported by CoinMarketCap.

data.title: Global launch event for Iza-bren Phase III Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma research results successfully streamed on ESMO site.
data.description: On October 20, 2025, the "Global Launch Event for Iza-bren (EGFR×HER3 Bispecific ADC) Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma BL-B01D1-303 Research Results" took place in Shanghai at 15:00 Beijing Time (09:00 am Berlin Time). The event highlighted the findings of the research related to BL-B01D1-303, with significant implications for treating Nasopharyngeal Carcinoma. This event occurred at the 2025 European Society for Medical venue, showcasing key advancements in cancer treatment.

data.title: Smartee Denti-Technology opens UK subsidiary & European Orthodontic Clinical Support Center in Stoke-on-Trent, solidifying its European presence.
data.description: Today in Stoke-on-Trent, England, Smartee Denti-Technology has opened its UK subsidiary and European Orthodontic Clinical Support Center. This move is a key part of their strategy to establish a stronger presence in Europe. The facility aims to provide support for orthodontic services across the region.

data.title: Social Governments Institute opens nominations for 3rd "Social Governments Award" 2025 in Dubai, after success of 1st Edition.
data.description: In Dubai, UAE on October 24, 2025, the Social Governments Institute has disclosed the commencement of nominations for the 3rd Edition of the "Social Governments Award" 2025. This follows the notable triumph of the 1st Edition. Effective communication plays a crucial role in empowering governments and is the focal point of this prestigious award. The previous edition garnered significant attention for its impact and innovation. The award aims to recognize exceptional achievements in governmental communication strategies. Nominations are open to contenders who have demonstrated excellence in this field, with a growing number of applications anticipated given the success of previous editions.

data.title: Companies to report earnings on Oct 24, 2025 before the bell:Eni - earnings expected at $0.73/share, revenue $22.45BSanofi - earnings at $1.60/share, revenue $14.46BVirtus Inv - earnings at $6.75/share, revenue $197.11MGentex - earnings at $0.47/share, revenue $671.14M
data.description: Before the market opens, Eni is anticipated to announce earnings of $0.73 per share with revenue reaching $22.45 billion, while NatWest Group is set to reveal its third-quarter earnings. Sanofi is projected to report earnings of $1.60 per share with revenue at $14.46 billion, and Virtus Inv is likely to report earnings of $6.75 per share generating revenue of $197.11 million. Gentex is estimated to announce earnings of $0.47 per share on revenue of $671.14 million. GrafTech International is expected to post a quarterly loss of $1.21 per share. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Bitcoin's price faces potential first 'red' October in 8 years, disappointing bulls with worst Uptober performance.
data.description: Bitcoin's price continued to decrease despite climbing back to the upper end of its recent trading range. This has caused concern among bullish investors, with some labeling it as the "worst Uptober ever."

data.title: Nasdaq surges 200 points post Trump's Russia sanctions; Greed index stays in 'Fear' zone; US stocks rise with energy sector boost.
data.description: The CNN Money Fear and Greed index showed a slight decrease in fear levels, while remaining in the "Fear" zone on Thursday. U.S. stocks saw a rise, with the Nasdaq Composite experiencing a surge of over 200 points in response to new U.S. sanctions on Russia's oil giants, boosting crude prices and energy shares. President Donald Trump's administration imposed broad restrictions on Rosneft and Lukoil, increasing pressure on Russian President Vladimir Putin to agree to a ceasefire in Ukraine. American Airlines Group Inc. (NASDAQ: AAL) shares rose over 5% on Thursday after reporting better-than-expected third-quarter 2025 financial results. For the full story, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Hesai Group will announce Q3 2025 financial results on November 11, 2025, with earnings call at 7:00 AM ET.
data.description: An earnings call is set to take place at 7:00 AM Eastern Time on November 11, 2025. This important event will provide stakeholders with insights into the company's financial performance and strategies for the future. It is a crucial opportunity for investors and analysts to hear firsthand about the earnings results and projections. Make sure to mark your calendars for this significant event in the business world.

data.title: TCL Technology adopts Global Code of Conduct in effort to enhance corporate governance and ethical standards.
data.description: TCL Technology, based in Shenzhen, China, has recently unveiled a new initiative on October 24, 2025, aimed at enhancing its corporate positioning in conjunction with ongoing board and talent management initiatives. The company has officially implemented a holistic Global Code of Conduct, highlighting its dedication to upholding ethical standards. This strategic move demonstrates TCL's effort to prioritize ethical practices within its operations.

data.title: AgiBot introduces LinkCraft platform, turning human motion videos into robot performances with world's first zero-code system.
data.description: AgiBot, a prominent company in humanoid robotics, introduced LinkCraft in Shanghai on Oct. 24, 2025. This innovative platform is the world's pioneer in effortless robot content creation, requiring zero coding skills. By integrating AI technology, LinkCraft empowers individuals to design personalized humanoid robot shows with ease.

data.title: Fetch.ai and Ocean Protocol decided to return $120M in FET tokens to prevent legal disputes. FET token value plummeted 93% post merger of ASAI, which founder says is not linked to Ocean Protocol.
data.description: The value of the FET token has plummeted by more than 93% following the amalgamation of the Artificial Superintelligence Alliance. The founder of the alliance has stated that this substantial decrease is not connected to any actions taken by Ocean Protocol.

data.title: HCA Healthcare expects to report $5.73 per share on revenue of $18.56 billion for Q3 earnings release. Wall Street analysts revised forecast.
data.description: On Friday, October 24, HCA Healthcare, Inc. (NYSE: HCA) will announce its third-quarter earnings before the market opens. Analysts predict the Nashville-based company will report earnings of $5.73 per share, a rise from $4.90 per share a year ago. The consensus estimate for HCA Healthcare's quarterly revenue is $18.56 billion, compared to $17.49 billion in the previous year. In the second quarter, HCA Healthcare exceeded earnings expectations. Closing at $440.16 on Thursday, HCA Healthcare’s shares dropped by 0.2%. For further details, readers can find the complete story on Benzinga.com, where they also access the most recent analyst ratings.
